raw: 26 Oxford Street Cambridge, MA 02138 617-495-3045 Get Directions Visit museum website for more information. This is a physical pass that must be picked up at the Reference Desk. Please remember we are closed on Fridays and Summer Sundays, so be sure to pick up your passes in advance. $6.00 Admission fee per person for up to four people. This pass also includes admission to the Peabody Museum of Archaeology and Ethnology.
